verses.text: A ni giat ni-in Moses in Aaron leh a tapate leh Israel upate a sam hi
Amah in Aaron' kiangah, “Khialhna hanga biakna dingin bawng pano khat leh meihal biakna dingin tuutal khat, a nih tuakin a sitbaanglo, la in la, Topa' mai-ah tuate pia in
Israel mite kiangah, ‘Khialhna hanga biakna dingin keel a pa khat, leh meihal biakna dingin bawngno khat leh tuuno khat, a nih tuakin kum khat pha-in a sitbaanglo

leh thunuama biakna-in Topa' mai-ah piak dingin bawngtal khat leh tuutal khat, leh sathau tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna la un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-in note tungah Topa hong kilang ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Amaute in zong kikhopna buk mai-ah Moses' thupiak teng hong paipih uh a, mihonpite khempeuh a nai-ah hong pai-in Topa' mai-ah ding uh hi
Moses in, “Note tungah Topa' minthan'na vang hong kilat theihna dingin Topa in hih bangin thu hong pia hi,” a cih khit ciangin

Aaron' kiangah, “ Topa' thupiaksa bangin biakna tau mai-ah pai-in khialhna hanga biakna leh meihal biakna pia in la, nangma-a' ding leh mite-a' dingin kilemna bawl in. Mite' biakna paipih in la, amaute-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Aaron in biakna tau naihin, ama-a' mahmah ding ahi khialhna hanga biakna bawngno a go hi
Aaron' tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a, amah in a si sungah a khutme diahin biakna tau kite nuh a, biakna tau bulah a si vallai teng a sungkhia hi
Ahih hangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin khialhna hanga biakna panin a thau leh a kalte leh a sintuamte biakna tau tungah a hal hi
A sa leh a vunte ahih leh giahphual pualamah mei tawh a hal hi
Tua ciangin a meihal biakna a go hi. A tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a, amah in biakna tau tung kimkotah a theh hi
Amaute in meihal biakna ama tungah a nen nenin a lutang tawh pia uh a, amah in biakna tau tungah tuate a hal hi
Tua ciangin amah in a sungkuate leh a khete sawp a, biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tawh tuate a halkhawm hi
Tua ciangin a masa-a khialhna hanga biakna mah bangin amah in mite' biakna pia-in, mite-a' ding ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel la-in go a, khialhna hanga biakna dingin a pia hi
Tua ciangin meihal biakna paipihin ngeina kip omsa bangin a pia hi
Amah in zingsanga meihal biakna banah biakna paipihin, tua sung panin a khutdim la-in, biakna tau tungah a hal hi
Moses' thupiak bangin amah in mite-a' dingin thunuama biakna bawngtal leh tuutal zong a go hi. A tapate in ama kiangah a si paipih uh a, amah in biakna tau kimkotah theh a
bawngtal leh tuutal thau, a mei thau, a gilpi tuam, a kalte, a sintuamte
leh a thau, amaute in a iikte tungah koihin, amah in biakna tau tungah a thau a hal hi
Ahih hangin Aaron in a iikte leh a taklam pheite, Topa' mai-ah vei-a biakna-in a vei hi
Tua ciangin Aaron in mite' lamah a khutte lamto-in thupha a piak khit ciangin khialhna hanga biakna leh meihal biakna leh thunuama biakna a piakna panin hong paisuk hi
Kikhopna buk sungah Moses leh Aaron hong tum uh a, hong pusuah khiat ciangun mite thupha pia a, mi khempeuh tungah Topa' minthan'na vang hong kilang hi
Topa' mai panin mei hong piangkhia-in meihal biakna leh biakna tau tunga om sathau a kang hi. Mi khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin awng uh a, lei maingatin a kunsuk uh hi.
